diagrams.title: Thread Scheduling Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how threads move between states and get scheduled on CPU
diagrams.purpose: Understand thread lifecycle and scheduling points

diagrams.title: Multithreading Models Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of three threading models mapping user threads to kernel threads
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how user threads relate to kernel threads in different models

diagrams.title: Round Robin Time Quantum Execution
diagrams.description: Shows execution order of threads in Round Robin with time quantum=4ms
elements: Ready queue state at each interval
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Round Robin cycles through threads with fixed time slices
